# 💬 Support

## Getting Help

Spiral Pool is free, open-source software maintained by volunteers. There is no paid support or SLA.

### 📖 Documentation First

Most questions are answered in the docs:

- [Operations Guide](../docs/setup/OPERATIONS.md) — Installation, configuration, monitoring, HA, troubleshooting
- [Reference](../docs/reference/REFERENCE.md) — Ports, CLI commands, API endpoints, config fields
- [spiralctl Reference](../docs/reference/spiralctl-reference.md) — Complete CLI reference
- [Architecture](../docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md) — Technical internals
- [Docker Guide](../docs/setup/DOCKER_GUIDE.md) — Docker & WSL2 deployment

### 💬 Community Channels

| Channel | Use For |
|---------|---------|
| [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/SpiralPool/Spiral-Pool/discussions) | Questions, help, general discussion |
| [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/SpiralPool/Spiral-Pool/issues) | Bug reports and feature requests only |
| [@SpiralMiner on X](https://x.com/SpiralMiner) | Announcements, quick questions |

### Unsupported Environments

The following environments are **NOT supported**. Issues from these environments may be closed without investigation:

- **Cloud/VPS deployments** (AWS, Azure, GCP, DigitalOcean, Hetzner, Vultr, Linode, OVH, etc.) — the installer blocks cloud infrastructure. See [WARNINGS.md](../WARNINGS.md).
- **ARM / Raspberry Pi** — all packages and binaries target x86_64 (amd64). ARM has not been tested.

### 🐛 Bug Reports

If you've found a bug, please [open an issue](https://github.com/SpiralPool/Spiral-Pool/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) with:
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Environment details (OS, version, coin)
- Relevant logs

### 🔒 Security Issues

**Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities.** Use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SpiralPool/Spiral-Pool/security) instead. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for details.

---

*Spiral Pool is community-supported software. Response times depend on volunteer availability. Thank you for your patience.*
